ssc_addon.warning.frost_pawglove_incompa: Incompatible mana structure, Frost Pawglove cannot function in this form.
tooltip.ssc_addon.launcher.usage: Hold Right Click to rapid fire
tooltip.ssc_addon.portable_fridge.desc: Equipped in Back Slot: Refills Launcher every 0.5s, Regeneration Charge every 2s
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_sp.titl:
‘When the curse merges completely with the moonlight, you are no longer just a familiar...
You are the agent of the Spirit Realm, master of the Blue Flame’

Exclusive Accessories/Tools: Blue Fire Amulet
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_sp.appe: Your body hasn't changed much, but your soul has been thoroughly eroded by the moon's curse. It grants you more power, but also more curses.
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_sp.pros:
Spirit Realm Lord
The magic within you has sublimated into a higher form, granting you unparalleled power:

Blue Fire Ring: You can activate a Blue Fire Ring around you. It continuously consumes mana to damage and inflicting severe burning on nearby enemies. While active, your Soul Reaping ability is greatly enhanced.

Fox Fire Breath: Consumes mana to breathe devastating Soul Fox Fire forward, dealing instant damage and igniting enemies for a long duration.

Soul Reaping: As a spiritual entity, you can draw power from fading lives. Killing targets restores a large amount of mana. If the Blue Fire Ring is active, kills also restore health and energy.

Mana Absorption: You can drain life essence directly from creatures, gaining mana and saturation. You can also slowly gather residual energy from the previous Cursed Moon from the atmosphere.

Spirit Embodiment: You are no longer mere flesh and blood, but a hybrid of flesh and mana. Thus, you are immune to more status effects, good or bad. With enhanced control over spiritual energy, when your mana is sufficient, overflowing mana forms a shield around you, reducing some damage.

Additionally, you retain all previous abilities: Illagers see you as an ally, you can see through creatures, and move freely through sweet berry bushes.
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_sp.cons:
Great power requires a huge price to maintain:

As a high-ranking spirit, your dependence on mana is more severe. Low or exhausted mana makes you weak and increases damage taken. Moreover, due to excessive absorption of moonlight power, your stored mana is near its limit. Absorbing too much more may cause you to explode like an overfilled balloon.

Your physical structure remains fragile; your health is no higher than a normal familiar.
You cannot equip leggings or boots, and move slowly in water.
You gain less saturation from food.
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_sp.inst:
Your control over spiritual power has reached another level, but your soul is more severely eroded by the Moon Curse. You feel yourself losing control over your body, constantly urged to unleash the Soul Fire within and burn everything in your path.
You have become a puppet of the moon, craving destruction and chaos.
You can no longer absorb the moon's mana because your body has reached its limit.
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_kill: Restores 15 Mana on kill. If Blue Fire Ring is active, restores an additional 5 Mana and 3 Health.
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_blue: Requires full Mana to activate. Consumes Mana per second to damage and ignite surroundings. Enhances kill restoration when active.
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_fox_: Consumes 25 Mana to breathe Soul Fox Fire forward, dealing 6 damage and igniting enemies for 10 seconds.
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_abso: Sneak and right-click a mob to consume Mana and drain its life essence. Depending on the target, gain healing, saturation, or special materials.
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_no_b: As a powerful spirit, you are immune to poison, hunger, nausea, etc., and fire damage (but still fear Soul Fire).
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_debu: Mana < 10%: -20% Attack/Speed/Mining. Mana < 3%: -60% stats and increased damage taken. Running out of Mana is torture.
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_mana: Passively regenerates 1 Mana every 20 seconds. Even when still, moonlight slowly returns.
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_init: Start with 100 Mana upon gaining the form, ready for battle.
power.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_sp_dama: Gain 20% damage reduction when Mana is above 50.
item.ssc_addon.active_coral_necklace.des: A necklace of active coral, bringing more vitality to the wearer
item.ssc_addon.sp_upgrade_thing.tooltip: A cross ring condensed from moonlight, allowing you to absorb more curses, but not increasing your max curse tolerance.
item.ssc_addon.blue_fire_amulet.tooltip_: Sealed with the magic of an ancient red fox
message.ssc_addon.evolution.success: “Excellent…” The moonlight whispers in your mind, closer and clearer than ever. With the whisper comes unparalleled power. You embraced evolution, meaning you embraced a deeper hug of the curse. It is a dangerous symbiosis, and you can no longer separate.
message.ssc_addon.red_transformation_spe: You merged with the power of the cursed moon, but your body seems to have temporarily transformed into a 'special' form. You only want to protect your teammates; for them, you can sacrifice your life.
message.ssc_addon.red_revert_timeout: You came back to your senses and realized your appearance had returned to its original form. You felt confused, but how could the characters in the story be real?
item.ssc_addon.lifesaving_cat_tail.toolt: A tail from another cat, perhaps it can prevent death
item.ssc_addon.frost_amulet.tooltip.2: The ice crystals inside change like brilliant fireworks
item.ssc_addon.phantom_bell.desc.1: A bell as cunning as a fox, allowing you to escape in critical moments.
item.ssc_addon.phantom_bell.desc.2: But it might also teleport you to your grave.
power.my_addon.wild_cat_sp_lifesaving_ta: A tail from another cat, perhaps it can prevent death
item.ssc_addon.evolution_stone.tooltip:
A living core condensed from moondust crystal and echo shard energy.
It awaits to unleash its true power.
message.ssc_addon.evolution_stone.succes: The Evolution Stone has merged into your body
message.ssc_addon.evolution_stone.no_res: The Evolution Stone does not respond to your request
item.ssc_addon.coral_ball.tooltip: A colorful ball made of various corals
item.ssc_addon.invisibility_cloak.toolti: Increases True Invisibility duration by 2s, but increases cooldown by 2s.
power.my_addon.form_axolotl_sp_rain_wetn: Slowly restores Moisture (Air) when exposed to rain, keeping you moist even on land.
power.my_addon.form_axolotl_sp_natural_r: Your natural regeneration speed is 20% faster than a normal Axolotl.
power.my_addon.form_axolotl_sp_play_dead: Actively enter Play Dead state for 6s. Gain Blindness and Immobility, remove all mob aggro, provide Regeneration III and reduce incoming damage by 90%. 36s Cooldown.
power.my_addon.form_axolotl_sp_water_bal: Trigger Water Burst when switching from sprinting to sneaking on ground, dealing higher damage than normal Axolotls. Consumes 5% Moisture.
power.my_addon.form_axolotl_sp_water_spe: Sneak + Right Click with an Arrow in offhand to craft a Water Spear. Consumes 10% Moisture and 1 Arrow. Water Spear applies Slowness II for 5s on hit.
power.my_addon.form_axolotl_sp_vortex_im: Create a vortex around yourself, pulling enemies in for 3s, then launching them and dealing 12 damage. Reduces incoming damage by 30% during skill. Consumes 20% Moisture.
origin.my_addon.form_axolotl_sp.name: SP Axolotl
origin.my_addon.form_axolotl_sp.descript: The spiritual evolution of the Axolotl, possessing powerful water skills.
message.ssc_addon.evolution.fail.no_moon: The metamorphosis to the essence requires the cursed moonlight as the final key. At this moment, the keyhole is empty—evolution has fallen silent.
message.ssc_addon.evolution.fail.bad_for: Current form is insufficient to carry echoes of older pacts. Evolution refuses to resonate deep within the bloodline; a deeper link cannot be established.
message.ssc_addon.evolution.fail.both: The foundation is too shallow, and the cursed rain has not fallen. In this double barrenness, the seedling of evolution has withered irretrievably.
message.ssc_addon.evolution.fail.already: Your attempt to establish a deeper link with the moonlight triggered a fatal resonance. Your form rejected evolution and returned the power of the curse—in the violent backlash, you became a brief, shrill echo under this cursed moon.
death.attack.cursed_erosion: %1$s was eroded by the power of the Cursed Moon
death.attack.cursed_burst: %1$s was burst by the power of the Cursed Moon
codex.status.my_addon.SP_status:
The Curse and Moonlight have completely synchronized; your soul has fully merged with that power.
Every breath you take resonates with the endless moonlight, a source of both power and pain.
codex.status.my_addon.familiar_fox_red_s: You feel your body is very light, as if it does not belong to this world.
codex.status.my_addon.familiar_fox_manci: An Evolution Stone has been welded into your soul, and a cold, precise Pillager weapon instinct awakens within you.
codex.status.my_addon.wild_cat_sp_status: The Evolution Stone has merged into your body, and you feel unparalleled power filling you.
codex.status.my_addon.snow_fox_sp_status: The Evolution Stone has merged into your body, and you feel unparalleled power filling you.
codex.form.my_addon.snow_fox_sp.title:
'When the curse merges completely with the arctic storm, you are no longer just a snow fox...
You are the embodiment of the North, master of the blizzard'

Exclusive Accessory/Tool: Blizzard Tank
codex.form.my_addon.snow_fox_sp.appearan: Your fur is as white as eternal snow, and your eyes glimmer with piercing cold light. Where you walk, the air condenses into frost. Your body radiates a chill that not even the hottest summer can dispel.
codex.form.my_addon.snow_fox_sp.pros:
Frost Spirit
You command the power of extreme cold to strike your enemies:

Snow Spike Dash: Consumes Frost, dash instantly towards your crosshair, dealing high physical damage with kinetic frost energy and inflicting Frost Freeze (greatly reducing speed/attack speed and increasing damage taken).

Teleport Attack: Use the cover of snow to teleport behind multiple enemies for a surprise attack. Deals increased damage to frozen targets.

Frost Ball: Launch a gravity-defying magic ice ball that inflicts Frost Fall, slowing enemies down.

Frost Storm: Channel power to summon a local frost storm. The storm continuously pulls in surrounding enemies and inflicts physical cutting damage with countless sharp icicles.

Additionally, you retain the traits of a snow fox and are completely immune to cold.
codex.form.my_addon.snow_fox_sp.cons:
Great ice power comes at a cost:

All active skills consume 'Frost'.

When Frost is depleted, you cannot cast skills and may become vulnerable.

You need to manage your energy wisely or equip a Blizzard Tank to assist in combat.
codex.form.my_addon.snow_fox_sp.instinct:
You crave the cold and detest the heat.
You may feel uncomfortable in high-temperature environments.
You have a natural affinity for snowballs and snow blocks, and the Blizzard Tank can be of great assistance.
origin.my_addon.form_snow_fox_sp.name: SP Snow Fox
origin.my_addon.form_snow_fox_sp.descrip: The sublimated form of a snow fox under the power of the Evolution Stone, controlling extreme cold magic and physical power.
codex.form.my_addon.axolotl_sp.title:
'When the curse merges completely with the essence of water, you are no longer just an Axolotl...
You are the controller of the abyss, master of the vortex'

Exclusive Accessories/Tools: Axolotl Humidifier
codex.form.my_addon.axolotl_sp.appearanc: Your body becomes more transparent, shimmering with faint water light. Your skin seems to merge with the surrounding moisture, creating ripple-like waves with every move.
codex.form.my_addon.axolotl_sp.pros:
Abyssal Overlord
Your control over water elements has reached a new height, granting powerful water skills:

Water Spear Crafting: Use arrows and moisture to condense a temporary Water Spear. Melee range and damage equal to a Trident; inflicts Slowness on hit.

Vortex Impact: Create a powerful vortex centered on yourself, pulling nearby enemies. Explodes after 3s, launching enemies and dealing high damage. Reduces damage taken by 30% during the skill.

Play Dead: Actively enter Play Dead state, removing all mob aggro, rapidly regenerating health, and greatly reducing damage taken.

Rain Hydration: Restore moisture in rain.

Rapid Metabolism: Natural regeneration speed increased by 20%.

Additionally, you retain all previous abilities: Water Breathing, Underwater Vision, Increased Swim Speed, etc.
codex.form.my_addon.axolotl_sp.cons:
Powerful water abilities require moisture to maintain:

All active skills consume moisture.

Movement speed is still slow on land.

You still cannot wear helmets.

As a carnivore, you can only eat meat.
codex.form.my_addon.axolotl_sp.instincts:
Your perception of water elements has peaked, but your body has become more dependent on water. You can sense distant water bodies and always crave to return to the water.
Even on land, rain brings you solace.
origin.my_addon.form_anubis_wolf_sp.name: Netherjudge
origin.my_addon.form_anubis_wolf_sp.desc: A special variant of the Anubis Wolf. The undead essence has been further sublimated under the power of the Moonshard Ring.
codex.status.my_addon.anubis_wolf_sp_sta: The power of the Moonshard Ring has fully merged with your undead soul. You feel the will of the netherworld flowing through your veins, the mission to judge all souls branded into your very essence.
codex.form.my_addon.anubis_wolf_sp.title:
'When the curse merges completely with the undead essence under the Moonshard Ring,
you are no longer merely the leader of the pack...
You are the arbiter of souls, the Netherjudge of the realm of the dead'

Exclusive Accessories/Tools: [Crystal of the Anubis Scepter]
codex.form.my_addon.anubis_wolf_sp.appea: The resonance of the Moonshard Ring has awakened deeper undead power within you. Your quadrupedal form has grown more imposing, with faint spectral light glimmering through the golden tufts along your cheeks. Your eyes burn with the flame of judgment, and soul sand whispers beneath your paws. You are no longer merely the alpha of the pack — you are the arbiter of the netherworld.
codex.form.my_addon.anubis_wolf_sp.pros:
Power of the Netherjudge
The curse of the Moonshard Ring has fully merged with the undead power within you, granting you the authority to judge beyond the pack:

Soul Scrutiny: Your eyes can perceive the aura of death. Living creatures within 16 blocks whose health drops below 20% will glow in your vision and emit soul particles, leaving them nowhere to hide.

Death Sentence: Damage dealt to targets below 30% health is increased by 20%. Dying prey cannot escape judgment.

Wither Hunt: When creatures afflicted with Wither exist within 24 blocks, gain 20% movement speed boost outside of soul sand areas. The scent of wither drives the arbiter to accelerate the pursuit.

Death Domain: After 2 seconds of channeling, temporarily turns all blocks within a 16-block radius cylinder into soul sand. Hostile creatures within the domain suffer Slowness I, Wither I, and a 15% max health reduction. The domain lasts 15 seconds.

Netherwolf Tribunal: After howling for 1.5 seconds, summon Netherwolf minions. Netherwolves inflict Wither on attack, and attacking withered targets heals the caster. When Death Domain is active, summon count is doubled and Netherwolves gain enhanced attributes.

Undead Neutral: As the embodiment of undead power, undead creatures no longer attack you unless you strike first. Neutrality is restored 30 seconds after you stop attacking.

Soul Sand Recovery: Standing on soul sand or soul soil allows the energy of the netherworld to slowly restore your health.

Additionally, you inherit all instincts of the Anubis Wolf Evo III: Soul Speed III, Undead Undying, Wither spread attack & lifesteal, instant kill on withered targets below 5 hearts, Instant Damage heals you, eating Bones, immunity to Hunger & Poison, increased Rotten Flesh saturation, further reduced damage from undead creatures. Skeletons will flee from you.
codex.form.my_addon.anubis_wolf_sp.cons:
The cost of undead constitution still follows you:

When attacked, the surging undead power causes you to suffer Wither.
You cannot naturally regenerate; Regeneration potions have no effect, and health recovery from saturation is extremely slow.
Meat dropped from killed creatures rots into Rotten Flesh, and harvested crops may turn to dust.
Vegetarian food provides no saturation.
Your direct damage to undead creatures is reduced.

Ordinary leggings and boots no longer fit your quadrupedal body.
codex.form.my_addon.anubis_wolf_sp.insti:
The power of the Moonshard Ring whispers of judgment and arbitration deep within your soul. You feel a sense of duty driving you to patrol the borders of the netherworld, judging all souls that transgress between life and death.
The soul sand beneath your feet is your throne, and the undead are your subjects. You are the Netherjudge, and the scales of souls rest in your hands.
message.ssc_addon.inhibitor.fail.sp_form: The inhibitor cannot revert this form
power.my_addon.true_invisibility.name: True Invisibility
power.my_addon.true_invisibility.descrip: Press to enter true invisibility state, undetectable by any creature. Attacking, mining, or using items breaks invisibility (glass shatter sound). Press again to cancel (cat hiss sound). Any exit triggers a 12s Cooldown.
power.my_addon.true_invisibility_dash.de: While invisible, press secondary key to break concealment and dash 5 blocks forward. Upon landing (or after 2s), stuns enemies within an 8-block radius for 1.5s. Stunned enemies cannot move, attack, use items, or turn camera. Wild Cats are immune.
power.my_addon.wild_cat_sp_speed_passive: Movement speed increased by 10% at night, decreased by 10% during the day.
power.my_addon.wild_cat_sp_night_strengt: All damage dealt increased by 1 at night.
power.my_addon.wild_cat_sp_diet.name: Feral Diet
power.my_addon.wild_cat_sp_diet.descript: Hunger restored by raw food increased by 100%.
power.my_addon.wild_cat_sp_ink_blind.des: Right-click while holding an Ink Sac in main hand to consume one and inflict Blindness for 3s on mobs within 5 blocks of diameter. 1.5s Cooldown.
origin.my_addon.form_wild_cat_sp.name: Wild Cat (SP)
origin.my_addon.form_wild_cat_sp.descrip: A special variant form of the wild cat.
codex.form.my_addon.wild_cat_sp.title:
'When power of the wild awakens completely, you are no longer just a wild cat...
You are the ghost of the jungle, the hunter of the night'
codex.form.my_addon.wild_cat_sp.appearan: Your body looks no different from a normal feral cat, but your eyes gleam with a more dangerous light, and your fur shimmers mysteriously under the moonlight.
codex.form.my_addon.wild_cat_sp.pros:
Moonlight Phantom
True Invisibility: You can actively enter complete invisibility. Attacking or using items breaks it. While invisible, you can use 'Stun Dash' or 'Weakness Spotting'.

Ink Blindness: Right-click with Ink Sac to blind nearby creatures momentarily, aiding escape or offense.

Night Walker: When night falls, your body becomes light, significantly increasing movement speed.

Power of the Night: At night, your attacks become more deadly, dealing increased damage.

Feral Diet: Your digestive system returns to the primitive state; eating raw meat (like raw beef, raw porkchop, etc.) grants double food and saturation.

Additionally, you retain all feral cat instincts:
Silent Steps, Creeper Deterrent, No Fall Damage, Phantom Scare.
codex.form.my_addon.wild_cat_sp.cons:
Price of the Wild:

Day/Night Dependence: Agile at night, but sluggish in sunlight.

Equipment Limit: You cannot wear leggings or boots as they hinder your agility.
codex.form.my_addon.wild_cat_sp.instinct: Your wild instincts have reached their peak, but your soul has also been eroded by the Moon Curse. You feel a stronger connection to the jungle, always yearning to hunt in the darkness.
text.ssc_addon.config.title: Shape Shifter Curse Addon Settings
text.autoconfig.ssc_addon_client.title: Client Config
Select the language of the Forgotten Legend story books generated by the server. Requires server restart to take effect.
Enable or disable the skill cooldown bar display on the HUD. Local only.
Enable or disable the remaining seconds display next to the CD bar. Local only.
text.autoconfig.ssc_addon_server.title: Server Config
Master switch - takes effect only on server / single-player host.
Enabled (default): keeps the original whitelist / friendly-fire exemption.
Disabled: offensive skills hit every entity; buff skills only affect non-monster / non-hostile entities.
message.ssc_addon.cursed_moon_sp_special: Strangely, it doesn't seem to have any visible effect on your body... Perhaps your current form is rather [special]?
origin.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_red.de: A Red variant form of the Familiar Fox.
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_red.tit:
‘When the curse merges completely with the moonlight, you are no longer just a familiar...
You have broken free from Selena's control, becoming the agent of the Spirit Realm, master of the Blue Flame’
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_red.app: Looks like an evolved familiar, but wearing a pair of potion bags. Resembles a familiar from a certain story.
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_red.pro:
Spirit Realm Lord
The magic within you has sublimated into a higher form, granting you unparalleled power:

Blue Fire Ring: You can activate a Blue Fire Ring around you. It continuously consumes mana to damage and inflict severe burning on nearby enemies. While active, your Soul Reaping ability is greatly enhanced.

Fox Fire Breath: Consumes mana to breathe devastating Soul Fox Fire forward, dealing instant damage and igniting enemies for a long duration.

Soul Reaping: As a spiritual entity, you can draw power from fading lives. Killing targets restores a large amount of mana. If the Blue Fire Ring is active, kills also restore health and energy.

Mana Absorption: You can drain life essence directly from creatures, gaining mana and saturation. You can also slowly gather residual energy from the previous Cursed Moon from the atmosphere.

Spirit Embodiment: You are no longer mere flesh and blood, but a hybrid of flesh and mana. Thus, you are immune to more status effects, good or bad. With enhanced control over spiritual energy, when your mana is sufficient, overflowing mana forms a shield around you, reducing some damage.

Additionally, you retain all previous abilities: you can see through creatures and move freely through sweet berry bushes.
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_red.con:
Great power requires a huge price to maintain:

As a high-ranking spirit, your dependence on mana is more severe. Low or exhausted mana makes you weak and increases damage taken. Moreover, due to excessive absorption of moonlight power, your stored mana is near its limit. Absorbing too much more may cause you to explode like an overfilled balloon.

Your physical structure remains fragile, but you can endure slightly more damage than a normal familiar.
You cannot equip leggings or boots, and move slowly in water.
You gain less saturation from food.
origin.my_addon.form_familiar_fox_mancia: A forbidden Pillager weapon forged from a familiar vessel.
codex.form.my_addon.familiar_fox_mancian:
‘Mancianima is not a blessing from a god, but an answer torn from a god's corpse...
With Evolution Stone and soul-welding rites, witches forged a familiar into the Pillager faction's quietest and most costly forbidden weapon’

It still keeps the outline of a familiar, but its fur, eyes, and spiritual pressure feel recalibrated by Spirit Realm crystal. Its movements are calm and exact, like a living weapon finally awakened after countless stabilization rites.

Forbidden Weapon
Mancianima is not a naturally evolved spirit. Witches reverse-engineered the corpse of a Spirit Realm Lord, then forcibly stabilized a familiar vessel into an advanced weapon. The Evolution Stone floods your body with mana, granting cold, precise, and lethal combat instincts:

Mancianima Brand (Primary): Sustained aim performs weapon calibration on a creature, first applying a yellow brand and then escalating it to a red brand. Killing a target during the brand window primes your pursuit system again

Soulleap (Secondary): Spend mana for a short-range teleport. Two modes are configurable: RAYCAST for instant blink and PLATFORM for landing-pad lock-on. Killing a target locked by Mancianima Brand resets teleport cooldown and refills your damage-resist buffer

Mana Drain: Recover mana from kills and slowly absorb residual Cursed Moon energy from the air

Bell Assault: Ringing a bell inside a village triggers Mancianima Assault. Nearby iron golems turn against you, and a dedicated Villagers Remaining boss bar appears; clearing every villager in range grants rewards (1 MC-day cooldown)

Villager Plunder: You cannot trade with villagers or wandering traders, but killing them plunders goods based on their trades and has an extra 30% chance to drop 1-3 emeralds

Villager Flee: Nearby villagers and wandering traders instinctively flee from you and are slowed

You also retain the familiar's baseline gifts: see-through-walls vision, free passage through sweet berry bushes, a small frame, and agile movement

Forced stabilization is not gentle:

All active abilities draw on mana. Without enough mana, you cannot teleport and Mancianima Brand escalates more slowly

The Evolution Stone's power is not a natural flow, but high-pressure spiritual energy forced into your body by stabilization rites; you must keep your combat loop alive through killing and draining

Pillager weapon instincts are carved into you. You cannot trade with villagers or wandering traders; they will flee from you and become targets for plunder

Bell Assault aggroes nearby iron golems and locks you out for 1 MC-day, making it dangerous for players who need to live near villages

Your body is still based on a familiar's frame: you cannot equip leggings or boots, and you move sluggishly in water

Food gives less satiety, so ordinary meals alone struggle to sustain this modified soul-vessel
The echo of the stabilization rites remains nailed into your soul: obey, lock on, pursue, clear the field. If no master is present, the weapon will find its own next command.
item.ssc_addon.potion_bag.tooltip: Red's exclusive potion storage bag, can only store potions, max 8 per slot
origin.my_addon.form_allay_sp.name: SP Allay
origin.my_addon.form_fallen_allay_sp.des: The fallen form of the Allay, belonging to the raid faction, can summon vexes to fight.
power.my_addon.form_fallen_allay_sp_acti: Summon two vexes to fight for you. Vexes prioritize marked targets and non-whitelisted players, lasting 35s. 20s CD after all vexes die.
Charge for 1s to highlight all non-whitelisted entities within 25 blocks and ground all flying projectiles. Glow lasts 8s, visible to all players. 20s CD.
power.my_addon.form_fallen_allay_sp_atta: When attacking or being attacked, the target/attacker glows for 10s. Vexes prioritize marked targets.
power.my_addon.form_fallen_allay_sp_cook: You can only eat cooked meats. Other food is inedible to you.
power.my_addon.form_fallen_allay_sp_fire: As a fallen spirit, you are completely immune to fire damage.
power.my_addon.form_fallen_allay_sp_raid: You belong to the raid faction. Pillagers won't attack you, and you cannot attack raid faction mobs. Your presence scares nearby villagers.
codex.status.my_addon.fallen_allay_sp_st: The moonlight of the Cursed Moon has eroded your soul. The once pure radiance has been devoured by shadow. You feel a powerful dark force surging within.
codex.form.my_addon.fallen_allay_sp.titl:
'When the moon's curse devours the crystal's purity,
you are no longer that carefree songster—
you are the shadow hunter, lord of vexes, kin of pillagers.'
codex.form.my_addon.fallen_allay_sp.appe: Your body is shrouded in a dim grey-blue haze. Your once light and translucent wings have become dark and sharp. Your eyes gleam with a cold light, and an oppressive aura permeates the air around you. Your existence is no longer a gentle melody—but a screech that makes all things tremble.
codex.form.my_addon.fallen_allay_sp.pros:
Spirit of the Fallen
You have embraced the dark side of the curse:

Summon Vex: Summon two loyal vexes to fight for you. They prioritize marked targets and hostile players, lasting 35 seconds. 20s cooldown after all vexes die.

Shadow Screech: Charge for 1s to unleash a soul screech, highlighting all non-friendly entities within 25 blocks for 8s (visible to all), while destroying all projectiles in range. 20s cooldown.

Hatred Mark: When attacking or being attacked, the target/attacker glows for 10s. Vexes prioritize marked targets.

Shadow Blade: Your melee attack damage is increased by a flat 2 points.

Raid Ally: Raid faction mobs see you as a companion and won't attack you. You cannot harm them either. Your vexes also won't attack raid mobs.

Levitation Flight: You retain the Allay's flight ability, floating with the jump key.

Silent Steps: Your footsteps make no sound, you can walk on powder snow, and you're immune to fall damage.

Omen Immunity: You are immune to Bad Omen and Hero of the Village effects.
codex.form.my_addon.fallen_allay_sp.cons:
Price of the Fallen:

Fragile Constitution: Your maximum health is lower.

Slow Mining: Your mining speed is reduced, even more so while flying.

Carnivore: You can only eat cooked meats. Other food is inedible to you.

Equipment Limitation: You cannot equip leggings or boots.

Villager Fear: Your presence scares nearby villagers.
codex.form.my_addon.fallen_allay_sp.inst: An endless screech echoes in the depths of your soul. You crave battle, crave the hunt—your vexes are extensions of your will, and each summoning deepens your bond with the shadows. You no longer need the gentle glow of amethyst; instead, you savor the aroma of cooked meat and the warmth of flames. Villagers flee in terror at your sight, while pillagers see you as a trusted companion. You know there's no going back—but you have no regrets.
origin.my_addon.form_allay_sp.descriptio: The special evolved form of the Allay, possessing flight and amethyst abilities.
codex.status.my_addon.allay_sp_status: The Curse and Moonlight have completely synchronized; your soul has fully merged with that power.
codex.form.my_addon.allay_sp.title:
'When the curse merges completely with the resonance of amethyst, you are no longer just an Allay...
You are the embodiment of melody, master of crystal sound'
codex.form.my_addon.allay_sp.appearance: Your body emits a pale blue glow, wings gently beating the air as you float in mid-air. Your very existence is a silent symphony.
codex.form.my_addon.allay_sp.pros:
Crystal Sound
You command the resonant power of amethyst:

Mass Purification: Charge for 1.5s to purify all potion effects from entities in a large radius and interrupt other SP forms' active skills.

Group Heal: Charge for 3s to consume all mana, heal all entities in a large radius for a massive amount, and grant healed targets Resistance I for 10s. A successful cast gives you 4 absorption hearts for 20s. If there are no other healable players in range, you are fully healed and gain Strength II, Resistance II, 6 absorption hearts, and a short ranged damage boost. Taking damage interrupts the charge and only grants you brief Resistance and Speed.

Crystal Ward: Normal single-hit damage cannot exceed 25% of your maximum health.

Trade Discount: Due to your cute appearance, you get a Hero of the Village II discount when trading with villagers.

Levitation Flight: You can float in the air by pressing the jump key, but it consumes hunger.

Amethyst Food: You can only eat Amethyst Shards to restore hunger. Eating them creates a resonance explosion, damaging nearby enemies and healing yourself.

Ranged Enhancement: Your ranged attack damage is greatly increased, and ranged hits restore 8% mana and half a heart every 3.5s.

Hit Recovery: You can recover health when dealing enough damage.

Creature Sensing: You can see glowing outlines of nearby creatures.

Jukebox Healing: You slowly recover health near a playing jukebox.

Powder Snow Walking: You can walk on powder snow without sinking.
codex.form.my_addon.allay_sp.cons:
Price of the Spirit:

Fragile Constitution: Your maximum health is lower.

Slow Mining: Your mining speed is reduced, even more so while flying.

Melee Weakness: Melee damage is reduced when using advanced weapons.

Equipment Limitation: You cannot equip leggings or boots.
codex.form.my_addon.allay_sp.instincts: You crave the glow of amethyst, and music is the source of your power. You feel light as a feather, as if you could float into the sky at any moment.
power.my_addon.form_allay_sp_purify.name: Mass Purification
power.my_addon.form_allay_sp_purify.desc: Charge for 1.5 seconds to purify all entities within a 20 block radius, clearing all potion effects and interrupting other SP form abilities. Movement speed reduced by 50% while charging. Press again to cancel. 30s cooldown.
Charge for 3 seconds to consume all mana, heal all living entities within a 20 block sphere for 20 HP, and grant healed targets Resistance I for 10s. A successful cast gives you 4 absorption hearts for 20s. If no other healable players are in range, you are fully healed and gain Strength II and Resistance II for 20s, 6 absorption hearts for 30s, and +30% ranged damage for 20s. Taking damage interrupts the charge, grants only yourself Resistance I and Speed I for 10s, and triggers a 5s cooldown. 30s cooldown.
power.my_addon.form_allay_sp_amethyst_sh: You can only eat Amethyst Shards. Other food is inedible to you.
item.ssc_addon.allay_heal_wand.tooltip: Right-click to heal the targeted entity
tooltip.ssc_addon.allay_jukebox.desc: Drag a music disc onto this item in inventory to charge
power.my_addon.form_allay_sp_emergency_f: Consumes 50 Mana to restore 1 Food (0.5 Shanks) and pauses Mana Regeneration for 3.5s.
message.ssc_addon.welcome: Welcome to Shape Shifter's Curse Addon! Due to the author's limited expertise, the mod may have bugs. If you encounter any, please submit your logs on GitHub:
message.ssc_addon.welcome.suffix: ; If a future update causes a crash, please submit the crash log and necessary info files to the mod's GitHub, thank you! PS: Due to the author's limited English proficiency, all English text is generated by Claude Opus, so there may inevitably be parts that are not entirely satisfactory — please bear with us.
power.my_addon.form_anubis_wolf_sp_withe: When creatures afflicted with Wither exist within 24 blocks, gain 20% movement speed boost outside of soul sand areas.
item.ssc_addon.anubis_crystal.tooltip_1: Exclusive to SP Anubis Wolf Form
item.ssc_addon.anubis_crystal.tooltip_3: Enhanced Death Domain auto-summon Netherwolf count +2
item.ssc_addon.ankh_stone.tooltip_1: Exclusive to SP Anubis Wolf Form
item.ssc_addon.ankh_stone.tooltip_2: Removes Wither and Weakness on revival trigger
item.ssc_addon.ankh_stone.tooltip_5: Cannot be crafted, only found in desert temple chests
origin.my_addon.form_golden_sandstorm_sp: The special variant form of the Jackal. The essence of wither has been elevated to the extreme under the power of the golden sandstorm.
'When the curse merges completely with the golden sandstorm, you are no longer merely a jackal of the desert...
You are the echo of the wasteland, the embodiment of eroding sand'

Exclusive Accessories/Tools: Erosion Sand Prism, Withered Sand Ring

Golden dust and withering breath coil around your body. Your fur carries a dark golden sheen like dunes at sunset, and every step seems to leave traces of soul sand behind. In your eyes, an endless sandstorm keeps turning.

Golden Sandstorm
The essence of wither has been pushed to its limit within the golden sandstorm, granting you powers of erosion and retaliation:

Wither Sand: Charge for 1s to unleash a 15-block golden sandstorm, inflicting Sand Blind for 3s on non-whitelisted entities and adding 1 Erosion Brand stack. Movement speed is reduced by 50% while charging. Taking damage interrupts the charge and triggers a 7s cooldown; a successful release triggers a 26s cooldown.

Erosion Brand: Melee attacks stack Erosion Brand on the target, up to 3 stacks, lasting 10s. By default, the same target can gain at most 1 stack per second. Attacking again at 3 stacks triggers a passive burst, dealing 20% of the target's current health as damage (cap 20) and healing you for 10% of your max health. The target then enters a green cooldown state and cannot be stacked again for a short time.

Detonate Brand: Detonate all non-green Erosion Brands, dealing 20% of each target's current health as damage (cap 20) and healing you for 20% of your missing health. Targets at 3 stacks trigger a passive burst before detonation.

Brand Perception: Erosion-branded entities glow in different colors based on brand level: yellow, orange, and red. Green indicates stack cooldown.

Counter Burst: When hit, automatically retaliate, knocking back non-whitelisted entities within 4 blocks and applying Wither I for 5s.

Wither Adaptation: You are immune to Wither, Blindness, and Sand Blind.

Additionally, you inherit most undead instincts of Anubis Wolf Evo III: Soul Speed, Undead Undying, bone eating, Hunger and Poison immunity, increased Rotten Flesh saturation, Instant Damage healing, soul sand recovery, reduced damage from undead creatures, and skeleton intimidation.

The golden sandstorm cannot erase the cost of undead constitution:

Starved Vitality: You can no longer regenerate naturally from saturation, and Regeneration potions have no effect on you. Your health can only be restored through Wither erosion, kills, and the passive cycle below:
　· Each time your applied Wither damages an enemy → +0.5 heart
　· Personal kill of an enemy → +2 hearts
　· Kill by your summoned Netherwolf → +1.5 hearts
　Passive cycle: out of combat → +0.5 heart every 10s; in combat → +0.5 heart every 6s

Meat dropped from killed creatures rots into Rotten Flesh, and harvested crops may turn to dust.

Vegetarian food provides no saturation, and your direct damage to undead creatures is reduced.

Ordinary leggings and boots still do not fit your quadrupedal body.

Wither Sand requires charging and is interrupted by damage; Erosion Brand also needs sustained pressure on a target to reach its full potential.

You hear grains of sand grinding deep within your soul, like the whispers of countless dead. You crave seeing enemies branded, swallowed by windblown sand, and slowly eroded by wither.
Each retaliation feels like the sandstorm answering your anger. Each detonation feels like the desert reclaiming prey it marked long ago.
power.my_addon.form_golden_sandstorm_sp_: Charge for 1s then unleash a 15-block AoE golden sandstorm, inflicting Sand Blind (3s) on hostile entities and adding 1 Erosion Brand stack. Slowed 50% while charging; taking damage interrupts and triggers 7s CD. Normal CD: 26s.
Detonate all non-green Erosion Brands: deals 20% of target's current HP (cap 20) and heals self 20% of lost HP. 3-stack targets trigger passive burst before detonation. 10s CD.

Melee attacks automatically stack Erosion Brands (max 1 per second, max 3 stacks, lasts 10s). At 3 stacks, further attacks trigger a passive burst: deals 20% of target's current HP (cap 20) and heals self 10% max HP. Target enters 5s stack cooldown (green marker lasts 10s). Melee brand stacking ignores whitelist, but splash brand stacking respects whitelist.
Erosion-branded entities glow with colors matching their brand level: yellow (1), orange (2), red (3), green (cooldown).
When hit, automatically knocks back non-whitelisted entities within 4 blocks and applies Wither I (5s). 15s CD.
item.ssc_addon.erosion_sand_prism.toolti: Exclusive to SP Golden Sandstorm Form
On brand detonation/burst, main target takes 60% damage; 40% splashes to entities within 5 blocks. Also adds 1 brand stack to entities within 4 blocks
Brand stacking cooldown increased from 1s to 1.3s
item.ssc_addon.withered_sand_ring.toolti: Exclusive to SP Golden Sandstorm Form
Detonation & passive burst damage cap increased by 30% (20→26)

Choose how Mancianima's secondary teleport behaves.
RAYCAST: instantly teleports along your crosshair direction up to 8 blocks.
PLATFORM: hold to show purple landing preview, release to teleport onto the locked platform; if no platform exists ahead, the teleport is refused with no cooldown.
message.ssc_addon.mancianima.teleport.ki: §cExecution! Cooldowns reset, resistance and mana refilled
